global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple shopping experience with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are centered in a lighter orange shade.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text reading 'Secure & simple' is prominently displayed, with a smaller line of text below it in a lighter font stating 'No hidden fees'.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in white, set against a solid orange background.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'EarnPath' appears in a bold font at the top left corner, contrasting against the orange background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, secure shopping, EarnPath, Shop now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: EarnPath, Secure & simple, No hidden fees, Shop now
